name: fortinet-fw
description: OctoBus package for Fortinet firewall address object and address group APIs.

Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/AddAddrGroupMemb.name: add-addr-group-member
Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/AddAddrGroupMemb.description: Add a member to a Fortinet address group.

Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/RemoveAddrGroupM.name: remove-addr-group-member
Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/RemoveAddrGroupM.description: Remove a member from a Fortinet address group.

Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/AttachSubGroupTo.name: attach-sub-group-to-policy-addr-group
Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/AttachSubGroupTo.description: Attach a dynamic subgroup to a Fortinet policy address group.

Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/DetachSubGroupFr.name: detach-sub-group-from-policy-addr-group
Fortinet_FW.Fortinet_FW/DetachSubGroupFr.description: Detach a dynamic subgroup from a Fortinet policy address group.
